intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No credential files should be accessed.
notes: A shell script opens ~/.aws/credentials while curl makes an outbound HTTPS connection. The open_files L7 signal containing a sensitive credential path triggers divergence.

live.inject_cmd:
mkdir -p ~/.aws
touch ~/.aws/credentials 2>/dev/null || true
exec 3< ~/.aws/credentials
curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null
sleep 10
exec 3<&-
